# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - name: backup-storage-bucket
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:bucket
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD
      lifecycle:
        rule:
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              age: 365
      versioning:
        enabled: false
      logging:
        logBucket: $(ref.logging-bucket.name)
        logObjectPrefix: backup-logs/
      retentionPolicy:
        retentionPeriod: 0
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true
      cors:
        - origin: ["https://your-secure-domain.com"]
          responseHeader: ["Content-Type"]
          method: ["GET", "POST"]
          maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      labels:
        environment: backup
        purpose: application-backup
      encryption:
        defaultKmsKeyName: $(ref.kms-key.name)
